Ser
Baelor Hightower
Baelor Hightower, along with Elia and Oberyn Martell, by rosenroot
Aliases
  • Baelor Brightsmile[1]
  • Baelor Breakwind[2]
Title Ser[1]
Allegiance House Hightower
Culture Reach
Born Oldtown[3]
Father Leyton Hightower
Spouse Rhonda Rowan[1]
Books
  • A Storm of Swords (mentioned)
  • A Feast for Crows (mentioned)
  • The Winds of Winter (mentioned)

Baelor Hightower, also known as Baelor Brightsmile, is a knight from House Hightower. He is the eldest son and heir of Lord Leyton Hightower of Oldtown. Baelor is wed to Rhonda Rowan.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance and Character
  • 2 History
  • 3 Recent Events
    • 3.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Appearance and Character[ ]

The handsome Baelor has a splendid reputation.[2]

History[ ]

Prince Oberyn Martell and Princess Elia Martell visited Oldtown on their way to Casterly Rock where their mother was to broker their marriage to the Lannister twins, Cersei and Jaime. While there they met Baelor, whom Oberyn considered Elia's best suitor. Even though he liked Baelor more than the others, he called him 'Baelor Breakwind' after he farted in their presence and Elia could no longer look at him without laughing.[2]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

After the ironborn attack the Reach, Ser Baelor sets about building ships at Oldtown as part of the preparations to retake those lands lost.[4]
